source: Output F — IP-safe HK landmark 'location' card subtype (the first 12)
legalBasis: HK Copyright Ordinance §71 — depicting a building in a public place does not infringe; building shapes/massing are free, only logos/signage/names are protected. All 12 are tier-green (natural features, heritage, temples, public infrastructure). Signage is abstracted; no real logos/text.

landmarks.name: Victoria Harbour
landmarks.blurb: The harbour plane + piers — the city's open heart.

landmarks.name: Kowloon Walled City Park
landmarks.blurb: Heritage garden on the old walled-city ground.

landmarks.name: Kai Tak
landmarks.blurb: The old runway, reborn as a new district.

landmarks.name: TST Clock Tower
landmarks.blurb: The 1915 railway clock tower on the waterfront.

landmarks.name: Man Mo Temple
landmarks.blurb: Incense-coiled temple to the civil & martial gods.

landmarks.name: Temple Street
landmarks.blurb: The night-market spine of Kowloon.

landmarks.name: Golden Bauhinia Square
landmarks.blurb: Waterfront plaza by the convention centre.

landmarks.name: Tsing Ma Bridge
landmarks.blurb: Suspension bridge — needs the infrastructure layer.

landmarks.name: Tian Tan Buddha
landmarks.blurb: The Big Buddha — needs the infrastructure layer.

landmarks.name: Tai O Stilt Houses
landmarks.blurb: Fishing-village stilt houses — needs marine/infra layer.

landmarks.name: Stonecutters Bridge
landmarks.blurb: Cable-stayed bridge — needs the infrastructure layer.

landmarks.name: Peak Tram (abstracted)
landmarks.blurb: Funicular up the Peak — needs the infrastructure layer.

landmarks.name: Quarry Bay · Monster Building
landmarks.blurb: The dense residential canyon — a famous photo spot.

landmarks.name: Western Market
landmarks.blurb: Edwardian heritage market hall on the praya.

landmarks.name: Central · IFC waterfront
landmarks.blurb: CBD towers — silhouette only, no logos (tier-caution).

landmarks.name: Causeway Bay
landmarks.blurb: Shopping-district crush by Victoria Park.

landmarks.name: North Point
landmarks.blurb: Tram terminus + the market-street tangle.

landmarks.name: Sai Ying Pun
landmarks.blurb: Sloped streets of the old western district.

landmarks.name: Kennedy Town
landmarks.blurb: West-end tram terminus by the praya.

landmarks.name: Wan Chai
landmarks.blurb: Old-meets-new tenement grid.

landmarks.name: Tsim Sha Tsui
landmarks.blurb: Kowloon's waterfront tip.
